metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: multi-review
plugins.description: Multi-perspective code review with validation and aggregation

plugins.name: jira-cli
plugins.description: Interact with Jira from the command line using jira-cli

plugins.name: pr-desc-review
plugins.description: Review PR descriptions to ensure they accurately reflect the implementation

plugins.name: claude-cleanup
plugins.description: Clean up stale project entries in ~/.claude.json whose directories no longer exist on disk

plugins.name: git-absorb
plugins.description: Identify and create fixup commits for staged changes using git-absorb
